description:
SUMMER STARTS NOW | EXCLUSIVE DEAL BY BLACKLINE. With The Market Settling & Demand Returning, We're Moving Into Summer Early - Aligned Back To The Blackline Standard. Choose One Of The Following Exclusive Offers Redeemable On Any Of Our Stock Cars. 1. Complimentary PPF (Gloss or Satin) 2. Complimentary 1 Year Insurance Cover (T's & C's Apply) 3. AED 10,000 Auto Loan Down Payment Contribution For More Information Please Reach Out To One Of The Team Today 
 2021 BMW X5 M50i, 4.4L TC V8, AWD, 523 bhp, 8 Speed Automatic. AED 209,000 or AED 3,274 / Month with 20 % Down Payment over 5 Years. 
 - Mileage Only 78,900 KM's - 1 Year Blackline Warranty - Full Service History - GCC specification - Price includes VAT 
 - Remote Engine Start - M Sport Exhaust System - 22” Alloy Wheels - M Sport Brake - M Sport Differential - Integral Active Steering - Comfort Access System - Soft Close Automatic System for Doors - BMW Display Key - Panorama Glass Roof Sky Lounge - Smokers Package - Cup Holder Temperature Adjustable - Active Seat Ventilation, Front - Comfort Seats, Electric Adjustable - Seat Heating Driver / Front Passenger - Glass Application Crafted Clarity - Travel & Comfort System - Interior Trim in Dark Wood - Automatic Air Conditioning 4-zone Control - Ambient Air Package - Massage Function for Driver and Passenger - Expanded Exterior Mirror Package - Ambient Light - Automatic High-beam Headlights Control - Active Protection - Driving Assistant Professional - BMW Laser Light - Parking Assistant Plus - Head Up Display - Harman/Kardon Surround Sound System - Apple CarPlay - Wireless Charging - BMW Live Cockpit Professional - BMW Gesture Control - M Leather Steering Wheel - M Aerodynamics Package - Roof-lining in Alcantara
